title: Cuneiform Tablet #0294: Old Assyrian Adoption
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a adoption document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Assyrian period — a adoption document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Assyrian period. Adoption document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records adoption matters typical of Old Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
